top_signals.title: Oregon port OKs federal rail grant agreement for multimodal project
top_signals.summary:
The Oregon International Port of Coos Bay secured a $25 million federal grant to advance planning for the West Coast's first fully ship-to-rail intermodal terminal.

The post Oregon port OKs federal rail grant agreement for multimodal project appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Superstate co-founder raises $3.6 million pre-seed for Ground to help fintechs access onchain yield
top_signals.summary: Ground has raised $3.6 million in a pre-seed funding round co-led by Bain Capital Crypto and ParaFi as it emerges from stealth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, June 24 2026
